en: After this Paul left Athens and went to Corinth.
zh: 此後，保羅離開雅典，來到哥林多，

en: And he found a Jew named Aquila, a native of Pontus, recently come from Italy with his wife Priscilla, because Claudius had commanded all the Jews to leave Rome. And he went to see them,
zh: 遇見一個生在本都的猶太人，名叫亞居拉。因為革老丟下令所有的猶太人都要離開羅馬，所以亞居拉最近同他的妻子百基拉從意大利來了，保羅就去找他們。

en: and because he was of the same trade he stayed with them and worked, for they were tentmakers by trade.
zh: 他們是以做帳棚為業的，因為是同業，保羅就與他們同住，一同工作。

en: And he reasoned in the synagogue every Sabbath, and tried to persuade Jews and Greeks.
zh: 每逢安息日，保羅在會堂辯論，勸導猶太人和希臘人歸主。

en: When Silas and Timothy arrived from Macedonia, Paul was occupied with the word, testifying to the Jews that the Christ was Jesus.
zh: 西拉和提摩太從馬其頓下來的時候，保羅就專心傳揚主的道，向猶太人極力證明耶穌是基督。

en: And when they opposed and reviled him, he shook out his garments and said to them, "Your blood be on your own heads! I am innocent. From now on I will go to the Gentiles."
zh: 但是他們抗拒、褻瀆，保羅就抖著衣服，對他們說：“你們的罪你們自己承擔，這與我無關。從今以後，我要到外族人那裡去了。”

en: And he left there and went to the house of a man named Titius Justus, a worshiper of God. His house was next door to the synagogue.
zh: 他離開那裡，到了提多．猶士都的家去。這人是敬拜 神的，他的家靠近會堂。

en: Crispus, the ruler of the synagogue, believed in the Lord, together with his entire household. And many of the Corinthians hearing Paul believed and were baptized.
zh: 會堂主管基利司布和他全家都信了主，許多哥林多人也聽了道，信了主，而且受了洗。

en: And the Lord said to Paul one night in a vision, "Do not be afraid, but go on speaking and do not be silent,
zh: 夜裡，主藉著異象對保羅說：“不要怕，只管講，不要閉口！

en: for I am with you, and no one will attack you to harm you, for I have many in this city who are my people."
zh: 有我與你同在，必定沒有人會攻擊和傷害你，因為在這城裡有許多屬我的人。”

en: And he stayed a year and six months, teaching the word of God among them.
zh: 保羅在那裡住了一年零六個月，把 神的道教導他們。

en: But when Gallio was proconsul of Achaia, the Jews made a united attack on Paul and brought him before the tribunal,
zh: 當迦流作亞該亞省長的時候，猶太人一致起來攻擊保羅，拉他到審判臺前，

en: saying, "This man is persuading people to worship God contrary to the law."
zh: 說：“這個人勸人不照著律法去敬拜 神。”

en: But when Paul was about to open his mouth, Gallio said to the Jews, "If it were a matter of wrongdoing or vicious crime, O Jews, I would have reason to accept your complaint.
zh: 保羅剛要開口，迦流就對猶太人說：“猶太人啊，如果有犯法或邪惡的罪行，我當然要耐心聽你們；

en: But since it is a matter of questions about words and names and your own law, see to it yourselves. I refuse to be a judge of these things."
zh: 但所爭論的若是關於字句、名稱和你們的律法，你們就應當自己處理。我不願意審判這件事！”

en: And he drove them from the tribunal.
zh: 於是就把他們從審判臺前趕出去。

en: And they all seized Sosthenes, the ruler of the synagogue, and beat him in front of the tribunal. But Gallio paid no attention to any of this.
zh: 眾人揪住會堂主管蘇提尼，在審判臺前打他。這些事迦流一概不理。

en: After this, Paul stayed many days longer and then took leave of the brothers and set sail for Syria, and with him Priscilla and Aquila. At Cenchreae he had cut his hair, for he was under a vow.
zh: 保羅住了許多日子，然後辭別弟兄們，坐船去敘利亞，同行的有百基拉和亞居拉。他因為許過願，現在期滿了，就在堅革里剃了頭髮。

en: And they came to Ephesus, and he left them there, but he himself went into the synagogue and reasoned with the Jews.
zh: 到了以弗所，保羅留他們在那裡，自己卻到會堂去，跟猶太人辯論。

en: When they asked him to stay for a longer period, he declined.
zh: 眾人請他多住些時候，他沒有答應，

en: But on taking leave of them he said, "I will return to you if God wills," and he set sail from Ephesus.
zh: 卻辭別他們說：“ 神若許可，我還要回到你們這裡來。”於是從以弗所開船去了。

en: When he had landed at Caesarea, he went up and greeted the church, and then went down to Antioch.
zh: 保羅在該撒利亞登岸，上耶路撒冷問候教會，然後下安提阿去。

en: After spending some time there, he departed and went from one place to the next through the region of Galatia and Phrygia, strengthening all the disciples.
zh: 住了一些時候，他又動身，先後經過加拉太地區和弗呂家，堅固眾門徒。

en: Now a Jew named Apollos, a native of Alexandria, came to Ephesus. He was an eloquent man, competent in the Scriptures.
zh: 有一個生在亞歷山太的猶太人，名叫亞波羅，來到了以弗所。他很有口才，擅長講解聖經。

en: He had been instructed in the way of the Lord. And being fervent in spirit, he spoke and taught accurately the things concerning Jesus, though he knew only the baptism of John.
zh: 這人在主的道上受過訓練，心靈火熱，很準確地講論，並且教導人關於耶穌的事，但他只曉得約翰的洗禮。

en: He began to speak boldly in the synagogue, but when Priscilla and Aquila heard him, they took him and explained to him the way of God more accurately.
zh: 這人在會堂裡放膽講論起來；百基拉和亞居拉聽了，就把他接來，把 神的道更準確地向他講解。

en: And when he wished to cross to Achaia, the brothers encouraged him and wrote to the disciples to welcome him. When he arrived, he greatly helped those who through grace had believed,
zh: 亞波羅有意要到亞該亞去，弟兄們就鼓勵他，又寫信請門徒接待他。他到了那裡，對那些蒙恩信主的人幫助很多，

en: for he powerfully refuted the Jews in public, showing by the Scriptures that the Christ was Jesus.
zh: 因為他當眾有力地駁倒猶太人，引用聖經證明耶穌是基督。
